title: Secretary of state; rules and regulations
doc_html:
§1246.  Secretary of state; rules and regulations

The secretary of state shall establish policies, rules, and regulations for the operation of the museum in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act.

Acts 1999, No. 1368, §1.
